results.rendered_html:
avatap 1 P. To radiate heat or light downwards.
— Caus.
1 To irradiate, heat; athāvatāpya pṛthivīṃ pūṣā divasasaṃkṣaye jagāmāstaṃ  Mb. 
2 To illuminate.
